def positive_namedtuple_fields_accessed_by_integer_index():
    rule_id = "namedtuple_fields_accessed_by_integer_index"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "namedtuple fields accessed by integer index instead of by named attribute."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
